recommended_primary_user: Etsy sellers making custom goods who manage 5–15 supplier invoices monthly
primary_problem: They miss supplier payment timing, causing late materials and late customer orders
mvp_wedge: For Etsy makers processing 5–15 supplier invoices/month, manual tracking causes late supplier payments. We automate payment scheduling instead of spreadsheets.
must_have_features: Link invoices to order due dates
notes: Narrow persona with clear workflow gap and accessible channels.
